headline: NX Group Becomes First-time Winner of HPE's Global Logistics Partner Award
summary: The NX Group, with NIPPON EXPRESS HOLDINGS, INC. as its holding company, has received its first Global Logistics Partner Award from Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. (hereinafter "HPE") at the HPE Operations Partner Summit 2026.
